modules.sql: WITH target AS (SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', MAX(ifw_effective_date)) AS INTEGER) = 6 THEN date(MAX(ifw_effective_date), '-1 day') WHEN CAST(strftime('%w', MAX(ifw_effective_date)) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN date(MAX(ifw_effective_date), '-2 days') ELSE MAX(ifw_effective_date) END AS target_date FROM cards), deduped_customers AS (SELECT c1.id, c1.first_name, c1.last_name FROM customers c1 INNER JOIN (SELECT id, MAX(ifw_effective_date) AS max_ifw_effective_date FROM customers GROUP BY id) c2 ON c1.id = c2.id AND c1.ifw_effective_date = c2.max_ifw_effective_date) SELECT c.card_id, CAST(c.customer_id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(cu.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(cu.last_name, '') AS last_name, c.card_type, c.expiration_date, CAST(julianday(c.expiration_date) - julianday(t.target_date) AS INTEGER) AS days_until_expiry, t.target_date AS ifw_effective_date FROM cards c CROSS JOIN target t LEFT JOIN deduped_customers cu ON CAST(c.customer_id AS INTEGER) = CAST(cu.id AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(julianday(c.expiration_date) - julianday(t.target_date) AS INTEGER) >= 0 AND CAST(julianday(c.expiration_date) - julianday(t.target_date) AS INTEGER) <= 90
